tldr_zh: Apple芯片新突破、AI數據中心衝突升級、泰國曼谷火災釀30死、美伊衝突升溫油價大漲。
tldr_en: Apple's AI chips legacy, AI data center conflicts escalate, Bangkok bar fire kills 30, US-Iran tensions spike oil prices.

items.title_zh: Apple自駕車計畫遺澤：強大的AI芯片開發進展
items.title_en: Apple's Self-Driving Car Program Leaves Legacy of Powerful AI Chips
items.summary_zh: Apple已取消自駕車計畫，但該計畫啟動的強大晶片開發成果仍被保留。在開發自駕平台期間，Apple意識到需要強大的設備端AI處理能力，這推動了其芯片設計的突破，最終讓Apple Silicon成為強大的AI性能處理器。
items.summary_en: Apple's discontinued self-driving car program left a significant legacy in AI chip development. The project drove the company to develop powerful on-device AI processing capabilities, resulting in breakthrough advances that made Apple Silicon one of the best AI-capable processors available.

items.title_zh: AI數據中心衝突激化　全球各地開始抵抗電力需求
items.title_en: The Fight Against AI Data Centers Is Just Beginning
items.summary_zh: 隨著AI熱潮加速全球數據中心建設，當地社區開始面臨電力短缺問題。專家警告，AI數據中心帶來的能源需求將引發更多的地方反對，這場衝突才剛剛開始。
items.summary_en: As AI boom drives unprecedented data center buildout globally, local communities are beginning to resist increased power demands. The conflict between AI infrastructure expansion and environmental/energy concerns is just beginning, according to industry analysis.

items.title_zh: 開源開機載入程式U-Boot揭露6個漏洞　伺服器物聯網設備受威脅
items.title_en: Six Critical Vulnerabilities Found in U-Boot Bootloader Affecting IoT and Servers
items.summary_zh: 韌體安全研究機構Binarly揭露開源開機載入程式U-Boot存在6個漏洞，其中2個可導致任意程式碼執行。這些漏洞影響廣泛的伺服器、網路設備和物聯網裝置，構成重大資安風險。
items.summary_en: Security firm Binarly disclosed six vulnerabilities in open-source U-Boot bootloader, with two potentially enabling arbitrary code execution. The flaws affect servers, network equipment, and IoT devices worldwide, posing significant security risks.

items.title_zh: Ray-Ban Meta AI眼鏡遭批評　歌手Lorde稱其缺乏吸引力
items.title_en: Lorde Criticizes Ray-Ban Meta AI Glasses as 'Not Sexy'
items.summary_zh: 紐西蘭歌手Lorde在馬德里演唱會上公開批評AI眼鏡產品，暗示Meta與Ray-Ban合作推出的AI智能眼鏡在設計上不夠具有吸引力。這反映出消費者對當前AI硬體設計的審美質疑。
items.summary_en: Singer Lorde publicly criticized AI glasses at a Madrid festival, taking a shot at Meta and Ray-Ban's AI smartglasses collaboration for lacking aesthetic appeal. The comment reflects broader consumer concerns about AI hardware design.

items.title_zh: 泰國曼谷啤酒餐廳大火　釀至少30人喪生
items.title_en: Bangkok Bar Fire Kills at Least 30 People in Chatuchak District
items.summary_zh: 泰國曼谷恰圖恰市集附近一間啤酒餐廳今日凌晨發生火災，造成至少30人死亡。濃煙迅速蔓延餐廳內部，導致顧客逃生困難，多人被困廁所身亡。
items.summary_en: A deadly fire broke out in a Bangkok beer restaurant near Chatuchak Market early this morning, killing at least 30 people. Heavy smoke rapidly filled the venue, trapping patrons and making escape difficult.

items.title_zh: 美伊衝突升溫　美軍新一波空襲伊朗　油價開盤大漲超3.5%
items.title_en: US Launches New Strikes on Iran Amid Hormuz Strait Crisis, Oil Prices Spike
items.summary_zh: 美國中央司令部宣布對伊朗發動新一波空襲，目的是削弱德黑蘭干擾荷莫茲海峽商船通行的能力。伊朗當局宣稱將關閉該戰略海峽，導致國際油價開盤大幅上漲逾3.5%。
items.summary_en: US Central Command announced new airstrikes against Iran aimed at weakening Tehran's ability to disrupt commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claimed the strait was closed, causing oil prices to spike over 3.5% at market open.

items.title_zh: 美國資深共和黨參議員葛蘭姆突然過世　年71歲
items.title_en: US Senator Lindsey Graham Dies Suddenly at Age 71
items.summary_zh: 71歲的美國資深共和黨參議員葛蘭姆11日突然過世，初步判斷死因與心臟相關。據華爾街日報報導，現場曾進行心肺復甦搶救。其過世動搖共和黨在參院的席次穩定性。
items.summary_en: Senior Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, 71, died suddenly on July 11. Initial findings suggest cardiac-related cause. The death, combined with another senator's hospitalization, threatens Republican stability in the Senate.

items.title_zh: 歐洲破紀錄熱浪釀逾萬例超額死亡　極端高溫成隱形殺手
items.title_en: European Heat Wave Causes Over 10,000 Excess Deaths in June
items.summary_zh: 官方數據顯示，6月下旬席捲西歐的破紀錄熱浪造成超過1萬例超額死亡。極端高溫成為隱形殺手，對公共衛生造成重大威脅，凸顯氣候變遷帶來的嚴重影響。
items.summary_en: Official data reveals that a record-breaking heat wave sweeping Western Europe in late June caused over 10,000 excess deaths. Extreme temperatures served as a silent killer, highlighting the severe public health impacts of climate change.

items.title_zh: 中國颱風來襲　浙江省疏散近200萬人　學校工作停擺
items.title_en: China Evacuates 1.9 Million People as Powerful Typhoon Lands in Zhejiang
items.summary_zh: 強颱登陸浙江省，中國當局疏散近200萬民眾。當地學校、工作和戶外活動已暫停，多數運輸服務也被取消，以確保民眾安全。
items.summary_en: China evacuated nearly 1.9 million people in Zhejiang province as a powerful typhoon made landfall. Schools, work, and outdoor activities were suspended with many transport services canceled.

items.title_zh: 西班牙山火肆虐　英國夫婦被困山谷　燒傷40%獲救
items.title_en: British Couple Rescued from Ravine During Spain Wildfires with 40% Burns
items.summary_zh: 西班牙阿美里亞省山火肆虐，一對英國夫婦被火焰困在山谷中，消防人員發現他們時已半昏迷，燒傷面積達40%。兩人已被成功救出。
items.summary_en: A British couple was rescued from a ravine during raging wildfires in Spain's Almeria province. The pair were found semi-conscious with 40% of their bodies burned after being trapped by the flames.
